description: Application enforces its own filesystem access boundaries independent of OS-level controls. Uses chroot-like path scoping, virtual filesystem abstraction, or explicit directory allowlists within the application code. Ensures that even if an attacker controls a file path parameter, operations are confined to the application data directory.

cvss_vector_impacts.rationale: File operations confined to application data directory; system files unreachable
Application cannot access files belonging to other services or the host OS

verification.method: Verify application restricts filesystem operations to designated directories
